duplicate_risk_note: Duplicate risk is not cleared. It remains pending live dashboard review because source-control, Drive metadata, builder queue, next-action, and blocker fields may already exist elsewhere.
source_of_truth_assumption: No production source-of-truth ownership is assumed. This project reads a lightweight registry only.
sync_question_for_dashboard_agent: Confirm whether these registry fields are safe as a builder-facing metadata contract, which dashboard or database owns each field, whether any duplicate fields already exist, and whether any field should remain summary-only before production sync or dashboard automation is added.

limited_handoff_scope.integration_mode: Add to existing Apps Script repo/project as a separate module with registry-specific filenames under src/registry-support/.
limited_handoff_scope.runtime_file_reference_rule: Because clasp rootDir is src, Apps Script template/include references use registry-support/<filename>.
limited_handoff_scope.client_ui_contract: Use Client.html as the render file. BuilderRegistryUi.html injects window.START_HERE_REPORT before loading registry-support/Client.
limited_handoff_scope.entrypoint_policy: Do not replace an existing doGet(). Use getBuilderStartHereHtml() from an approved existing router.
safe_defaults: No production writes unless explicitly approved
